cl_boxmove_speed.description: how fast to run (1 to use player max run speed).

cl_clock_buffer_ticks.description: Clock sync will try to maintain an additional margin of N ticks.  This is intended to smooth over packet loss, and is a replacement for cl_interp_ratio / cl_interp.  This value is simply added to cl_clock_recvmargin_desired

cl_clock_buffer_ticks_spectator.description: Additional margin (in ticks) to apply when spectating.

cl_clock_correction.description: Enable/disable clock correction on the client.

cl_clock_recvmargin_adjust_limit_slowdow.description: Clock sync will not slow down time slower than N%

cl_clock_recvmargin_adjust_limit_speedup.description: Clock sync will not speed up time faster than N%

cl_clock_recvmargin_desired.description: Clock sync will try to maintain N ms margin between tick arrival and polling network.  The effective value is the sum of this and the time implied by cl_clock_buffer_ticks

cl_clock_recvmargin_timeconstant_slowdow.description: Clock sync will remove 63.2% of the error in N seconds

cl_clock_recvmargin_timeconstant_speedup.description: Clock sync will remove 63.2% of the error in N seconds

cl_clock_recvmargin_window.description: Clock sync will use past N seconds

cl_clockdrift_max_ticks.description: Maximum number of ticks the clock is allowed to drift before the client snaps its clock to the server's.

cl_connectionretrytime_p2p.description: Number of seconds over which to spread retry attempts for P2P.

cl_cq_min_queue.description: Used by the client to inform the server of their desired queue length.  Derived from cl_tickpacket_recvmargin_desired and cl_tickpacket_desired_queuelength

cl_demo_steadycam_deflection.description: if camera orientation changes this much update orientation

cl_demo_steadycam_enable.description: Stabilize camera orientation/position during demo playback.  1 == remove roll, 2 == steadycam

cl_demo_steadycam_radius.description: if camera moves this much from last anchor update anchor

cl_demo_view_offset_left.description: View offset during demo playback (+/- 1.25 is a good default for human average left/right eye offset)

cl_disconnect_soundevent.description: This soundevent is called to stop the desired soundevents when the game is disconnected.

cl_disconnect_voice_fade.description: This is a fade of current voices that is called when the game is disconnected. -1.f for no fade on disconnect

cl_dormant_spew.description: Spew state on when client entities become dormant or active.

cl_drawhud.description: Enable the rendering of the hud

cl_ent_joint_lines.description: Draw a line between a rendered joint and its parent.

cl_ent_joint_names.description: Draw the name of a rendered joint.

cl_ent_show_contexts.description: Show entity contexts in ent_text display

cl_error_report_time.description: Minimum time in seconds that must elapse before printing prediction error summary. 0 to disable.

cl_extrapolate.description: Enable/disable extrapolation if interpolation history runs out.

cl_extrapolate_amount.description: Set how many seconds the client will extrapolate entities for.

cl_flushentitypacket.description: For debugging. Force the engine to flush an entity packet.

cl_frametime_summary_report_detailed.description: When a perf report is dumped at the end of the session, should it be detailed?

cl_generate_postdataupdatepreserved.description: Do we invoke PostDataUpdatePreserved callbacks for entities that had no changes but are still in the PVS?

cl_hold_game_events_force_delay_ticks.description: Debugging convar to force late dispatch of game events.

cl_hold_game_events_until_server_tick.description: Holds game events until client has received the tick the event was fired on.

cl_hud_telemetry_frametime_poor.description: Frame time greater than this is considered 'poor'.

cl_hud_telemetry_frametime_show.description: Show frame time (FPS) in the HUD.  0=never, 1=only if poor, 2=always

cl_hud_telemetry_net_detailed.description: Show breakdown network misdelivery (loss, late delivery, and peak jitter).  0=never, 1=only in poor network conditions, 2=always

cl_hud_telemetry_net_misdelivery_poor.description: Packet delivery anomaly rate (0..100) higher than this is considered 'poor'.

cl_hud_telemetry_net_misdelivery_show.description: Show percentage of user commands & server snapshots that are missed due to network conditions.  0=never, 1=only in poor conditions, 2=always

cl_hud_telemetry_net_quality_graph_show.description: Show packet jitter and netframe loss/reordering in the HUD.  0=never, 1=only in poor conditions, 2=always

cl_hud_telemetry_ping_poor.description: Ping higher than this (ms) is considered 'poor'.

cl_hud_telemetry_ping_show.description: Show ping in the HUD.  0=never, 1=only in poor conditions, 2=always

cl_hud_telemetry_serverrecvmargin_graph_.description: Show graph of the server recv margin in the HUD.  (How early/late user commands are arriving at the server before they are executed.)   0=never, 1=only when there are command queue problems, 2=always

cl_ignorepackets.description: Force client to ignore packets (for debugging).

cl_interp_animationvars.description: Interpolate LATCH_ANIMATION_BIT vars if interpolation interval is greater than simulation interval

cl_interp_hermite.description: Set to zero do disable hermite interpolation.

cl_interp_npcs.description: Interpolate NPC positions starting this many seconds in past (or the value as per cl_interp_ratio, if greater)

cl_interp_parallel.description: Run interpolation in parallel for entities with no children.

cl_interp_ratio.description: Sets the client simulation interpolation amount, in terms of server updates (final amount is cl_interp_ratio / cl_updaterate).

cl_interp_simulationvars.description: Interpolate LATCH_SIMULATION_BIT vars if interpolation interval is greater than animation interval

cl_interp_threadmodeticks.description: Additional interpolation ticks to use when interpolating with threaded engine mode set.

cl_interpolate_report.description: Enable to show interpolation profile timing

cl_jitter_bad_threshold_up.description: When upstream packet jitter in a frame exceeds this threshold (ms), the frame is considered to have 'irregular delivery'.  This is a derived value and should not be modified manually

cl_lagcompensation.description: Perform server side lag compensation of weapon firing events.

cl_latch_report.description: Enable to output stats about latching

cl_log_tick.description: Log when a tick is received

cl_log_tick_skips.description: Log when the tick delta >= this

cl_meep_mop_volume_trigger_max_count.description: Number of triggers before meemop reaches full volume

cl_net_showevents.description: Dump game events to console (1=client only, 2=all).

cl_panel_freeze_time_after_press.description: time to freeze mouse/pointer motion after a mouse button press

cl_parallel_readpacketentities.description: Set to 1 to use threading snapshot reading (if game supports and server is sending bitcounts).

cl_parallel_readpacketentities_threshold.description: Use parallel processing of snapshot reading if above this many entries.

cl_pdump.description: Dump info about this entity to screen.

cl_phys_assume_fixed_tick_interval.description: If true, we assume the client uses a fixed tickrate like the server (which may not always be true). If false, we recalculate the number of physics substeps in each client tick based on the actual elapsed time in the tick.

cl_phys_sleep_enable.description: Enable sleeping for dynamic physics bodies.

cl_phys_sound_disable_impact_sounds_unde.description: if true, impact sounds wont play if no soft impact sound is present and the impact is below the hard velocity threshold.

cl_playback_screenshots.description: Allows the client to playback screenshot and jpeg commands in demos.

cl_poll_network_early.description: Enable polling for network messages every frame, instead of every tick

cl_pred_build_verbose.description: Verbose spew when building prediction optimized data runs.

cl_pred_optimize.description: Optimize for not repredicting if there were no errors

cl_pred_print_every_cmd.description: Print something every time we predict a command

cl_prediction_savedata_postentitypacketr.description: Experimental optimization.  If you are reading this in 2026, please delete this convar.

cl_ragdoll_limit.description: Maximum number of ragdolls to show (-1 disables limit)

cl_resend.description: Delay in seconds before the client will resend the 'connect' attempt

cl_retire_low_priority_lights.description: Low priority dlights are replaced by high priority ones

cl_screenmessage_notifytime.description: How long to display screen message text

cl_showdemooverlay.description: How often to flash demo recording/playback overlay (0 - disable overlay, -1 - show always)

cl_showerror.description: Show prediction errors, 2 for above plus detailed field deltas, 3 to filter out serverside known prediction errors, -entindex for specific entity.

cl_showfps.description: Draw fps meter at top of screen (1 = fps, 2 = smooth fps, 3 = server MS, 4 = Show FPS and Log to file )

cl_showlagcompensation.description: Draw hitboxes of entities we are shooting at to compare against lag compensated server entities

cl_showmem.description: Draw approximate memory use at top of screen

cl_showpos.description: Draw current position at top of screen

cl_showtextmsg.description: Enable/disable text messages printing on the screen.

cl_showtick.description: Show current tick/time values.  Bitmask:  1='render time'  2='GameTime'   4=time of predicted entities  8=offset of predicted entities    (-1 means 'everything')

cl_skeleton_instance_smear_boneflags.description: Smear boneflags across the model.  Costs computation, but tests to make sure your bone flags are consistent.

cl_skip_hierarchy_update_for_unchanged_e.description: Skip updating hierarchy information in PostDataUpdate for entities that have not changed

cl_smooth.description: Smooth view/eye origin after prediction errors

cl_smoothtime.description: Smooth client's view after prediction error over this many seconds

cl_snd_new_visualize.description: Displays soundevent name played at it's 3d position

cl_spawngroup_log.description: Dump the contents of the next spawngroup manifest to file.

cl_tickpacket_desired_queuelength.description: This value, multiplied by the tick interval, is added to cl_tickpacket_recvmargin_desired to obtain the effective desired recv margin.

cl_tickpacket_recvmargin_adjust_limit.description: Recvmargin-based usercommand pacing will not speed up or slow down command pacing by more than N% compared to realtime

cl_tickpacket_recvmargin_desired.description: Recvmargin-based usercommand pacing will try to maintain N ms margin between user command arriving at the server and the server needing that user command.  See also cl_tickpacket_desired_queuelength.

cl_tickpacket_recvmargin_minsamples.description: Recvmargin-based usercommand pacing will not take action unless we have N samples

cl_tickpacket_recvmargin_timeconstant.description: Recvmargin-based usercommand pacing will remove 63.2% of the error in N seconds

cl_tickpacket_recvmargin_window.description: Recvmargin-based usercommand pacing will use past N seconds

cl_ticks_net_print_threshold.description: Print a message if network issues cause problems with server snapshots of user commands not being available when needed, if the percentage (0...100) exceeds this value.  A value of 0 will cause the message to always print each time it is calculated

cl_ticks_warning_level.description: Print a message about problems with ticks and interpolation.  0=never, 1=warnings, 2=all, even if hidden by interpolation

cl_timeout.description: After this many seconds without receiving a packet from the server, the client will disconnect itself

cl_updaterate.description: Number of packets per second of updates you are requesting from the server

cl_usercmd_dbg.description: show usercmd payload sizing info for packets with more than this many usercmds

cl_usercmd_max_per_movemsg.description: max number of CUserCmds to send in one client move message

cl_usesocketsforloopback.description: When connecting to local listen server (for example, using the 'map' command), default to loopback=false, which connects to '127.0.0.1' instead of 'loopback'.  This uses the network stack so that fake lag/loss can be simulated.

cl_vsnd_morph_override_ease_enabled.description: Controls whether the compiled in vsnd morph data ease in/out values are used or values set from the convars (cl_vsnd_morph_override_ease_in, cl_vsnd_morph_override_ease_out) are used

cl_vsnd_morph_override_ease_in.description: If cl_enable_vsnd_morph_override_ease_enabled is true, ease into vsnd morph driven animation over the specified number of seconds.

cl_vsnd_morph_override_ease_out.description: If cl_enable_vsnd_morph_override_ease_enabled is true, ease out of vsnd morph driven animation over the specified number of seconds.

clientport.description: If non-zero, client binds port to specific address.  Usually you should leave this blank to use a different random system-assigned port for each connection.

cloth_filter_transform_stateless.description: Enable the new, stateless version of FilterTransform

cloth_ground_plane_thickness.description: Raise ground by this much for all cloth that traces the ground; should be 0 ideally

cojob_lock_hold_warning_threshold_ms.description: How long in milliseconds before we warn about lock hold duration

cojob_max_no_yield_time_us.description: Will spew if a job takes longer than the specified number of microseconds

collect_asserts_for_gc.description: Whether or not asserts should be collected for sending to the GC

commentary_available.description: Automatically set by the game when a commentary file is available for the current map.

con_enable.description: Allows the console to be activated.

convars_echo_toggle_changes.description: Echo to the console changes caused by toggling.

cq_buffer_bloat_msecs_max.description: Server will not allow the client to buffer up more than N ms of commands.

cq_dilation_percentage.description: When speeding up slowing down, this is how much

cq_enable.description: Run one usercmd per server tick and maintain a buffer.  Client speeds up/slows down it's usercmd tick rate to maintain server command queue buffering.

cq_fake_starve.description: if set, starve this many commands by discarding during process usercmds.

cq_logging_interval.description: command queue logging per player stats every N seconds, 0 to disable.

cq_max_starved_substitute_commands.description: Server will stop generating substitute commands if client hasn't sent one, after N in a row

cq_print_every_command.description: print every command as we execute it

cq_runtests_broadcast_info.description: send message to remote client console when tests change.

csm_max_num_cascades_override.description: Number of cascades in sunlight shadow

cv_collect_assert_stack_for_gc.description: When enabled and collecting asserts for the GC, this will generate stacks for the asserts

d3d_max_feature_level.description: Report the maximum D3D feature level available.

deadlock_disable_post_match_survey.description: Disable the early post match survey

deadlock_early_development_warning_disab.description: Disable the early dev build message

deadlock_mm_preference.description: What style of player do we want to try and match with in matchmaking

deadlock_steam_input_on_disc_manifest.description: Use local cfg\steam_input_manifest.vdf as opposed to cloud manifest

demo_allow_game_mismatch.description: Allow playback of demo even if game directories are not matched [may crash or fail to load].

demo_flush.description: Flush writing the demo file every network update

demo_max_consecutive_skip_packets.description: Don't skip more than N messages in a row when skipping in a demo file.

demo_recordcommands.description: Record commands typed at console into .dem files.

demo_usefastgoto.description: Use fast frame skipping when available for demo_goto commands.

demo_writefullupdate_rate.description: Interval time in seconds to write full updates to demo.

disable_dynamic_prop_loading.description: If non-zero when a map loads, dynamic props won't be loaded

disable_source_soundscape_trace.description: Bypasses lookup of soundscapes for indvidual audio sources when enabled.

dota_enable_spatial_audio.description: Flag to enable spatial audio in Dota 2.

dota_spatial_audio_mix.description: Mix value to blend spatial and non-spatial audio in Dota 2.

draw_footstep_occlusion.description: draws footstep/foley events that are heard or not heard

engine_accurate_input_processing_delta_t.description: When true, elapsed time given to the input processing will be the time elapsed since the last input processing. This is only relevant when input is processed multiple times per frame ( i.e. multiple ticks per frame)

engine_allow_multiple_simulates_per_fram.description: When the client is catching up in low frame rate situations, should we run client simulate more than once a frame?

engine_allow_multiple_ticks_per_frame.description: When the client is catching up in low frame rate situations, should we run tick more than once a frame?

engine_frametime_warnings_enable.description: Enable framerate-related warnings, such as sv_long_frame_ms.  Disabling warnings is useful when running in situations such a debug where a slow frame rate is expected

engine_low_latency_sleep_after_client_ti.description: When r_low_latency is enabled, this moves the low latency sleep on tick frames to happen after client simulation.

engine_max_ticks_to_simulate.description: Max number of ticks to simulate per frame, after which simulation will start to slow down compared to real time.

engine_no_focus_sleep_vconsole_suppress.description: When VConsole is in the foreground, don't trigger engine_no_focus_sleep behavior

engine_relaunch_app_before_exiting.description: Use this to tell Steam to relaunch the app right after existing

engine_rendersystem_meets_min_dx_110.description: Rendersystem meets min DX110 feature level (changing this does not change the shader model).

engine_rendersystem_meets_min_dx_110_sim.description: Rendersystem meets min DX110 feature level (changing this does not change the shader model).

engine_rendersystem_shader_model.description: Rendersystem shader model in use (changing this does not change the shader model).

engine_sse42.description: turn on sse4.2 optimizations in the engine

english.description: If set to 1, running the english language set of assets.

ent_joint_lines.description: Draw a line between a rendered joint and its parent.

ent_joint_names.description: Draw the name of a rendered joint.

ent_show_contexts.description: Show entity contexts in ent_text display

ent_steadystate_batchsize.description: Max number of entities to transmit to player

ent_steadystate_delay.description: Time in seconds without network state changes until an entity is considered for trickle updates

ent_steadystate_interval.description: Rate at which entities can be trickled to players

entity_log_load_unserialize.description: Output unserialization of entities on map load. 0 - off, 1 - client/server, 2 - server, 3 - client

filesystem_buffer_size.description: Size of per file buffers. 0 for none

fish_dormant.description: Turns off interactive fish behavior. Fish become immobile and unresponsive.

fog_override.description: Overrides the map's fog settings (-1 populates fog_ vars with map's values)

fog_override_enable.description: Use fog_override convars instead of world fog data

fps_max.description: Frame rate limiter.  0=no limit.  Does not apply to dedicated server.

fps_max_tools.description: Additional frame rate limit while in tools mode and a window other than the game window has focus. Note that fps_max still applies, this only allows the maximum frame rate for tools mode to be lower. 0=no tools specific limit.

fps_max_ui.description: Frame rate limiter while the game UI is displayed.  0=no limit.  Does not apply to dedicated server.

freecamera_accel.description: Tweak this parameter to adjust Free Camera movement acceleration.

freecamera_max_speed.description: Tweak this parameter to adjust Free Camera movement max speed.

freecamera_rotation_multiplier.description: Tweak this parameter to adjust Free Camera mouse rotation.

friend_menu_group_party_members.description: Controls whether or not the friend list has grouping for party members or not

fs_async_threads.description: Number of IO threads in async filesystem (-1 == auto)

fs_fake_read_delay_ms.description: Add N ms of delay to every low-level read operation, to simulate a slow disk

fs_report_long_reads.description: 0:Off, 1:All (for tracking accumulated duplicate read times), >1:Microsecond threashold

gameevents_showevents.description: Dump game events to console. (1 = Show Signaling, 2 = Show Posting also).

gameinstructor_enable.description: Display in game lessons that teach new players.

gameinstructor_find_errors.description: Set to 1 and the game instructor will run EVERY scripted command to uncover errors.

gameinstructor_start_sound_cooldown.description: Number of seconds forced between similar lesson start sounds.

gameinstructor_verbose.description: Set to 1 for standard debugging or 2 (in combo with gameinstructor_verbose_lesson) to show update actions.

hide_party_code.description: When set, this will hide the party code in the client

hideout_single_player.description: Allows creating a hideout for a party even if a single player (dev only)

host_framerate.description: Set to lock per-frame time elapse.

host_readconfig_ignore_userconfig.description: Whether we should ignore the user config file for reading/writing.

host_timescale.description: Prescale the clock by this amount.

hostname_in_client_status.description: Show server hostname in client status.

hud_damagemeter_ooctimer.description: How many seconds after the last damage event before we consider the player out of combat.

hud_damagemeter_report.description: Display end-of-combat DPS result (from first damage even to last before OOC timer hit).

hud_free_cursor.description: If -1 use the hud default, otherwise 0 is disabled, 1 is enabled

hullivr_edge_merge_tan.description: Should we try to straighten two faces connected to this edge? (tangent)

hullivr_faceisland_merge_disp.description: Should we straighten face island if the displacement is this much? (inches)

hullivr_faceisland_merge_tan.description: Should we try to straighten an island of faces deviating from their average normal (tangent)?

in_button_double_press_window.description: How short the time between presses needs to be for us to consider it a double-press

in_spewbuttondelta.description: Spew button deltas, 0 = off, 1 = server, 2 = client, 3 = both

in_spewbuttonhold.description: Spew button hold times, 0 = off, 1 = server, 2 = client, 3 = both

in_spewent.description: Which entity should we spew input for? (Useful for debugging bot input)

in_spewinput.description: Spew input, 0 = off, 1 = server, 2 = client, 3 = both

input_button_code_is_scan_code_scd.description: Bind keys based on keyboard position instead of key name

input_forceuser.description: Force user input to this split screen player.

instant_replay_history_limit.description: Maximum amount of minutes to save history (0 is unlimited).

instant_replay_history_limit_low.description: Maximum amount of minutes to save history on low memory (32 bit) systems (0 is unlimited).

joy_autosprint.description: Automatically sprint when moving with an analog joystick

joy_movement_stick.description: Which stick controls movement (0 is left stick)

joy_xcontroller_cfg_loaded.description: If 0, the 360controller.cfg file will be executed on startup & option changes.

joystick.description: True if the joystick is enabled, false otherwise.

kelvin_ice_path_health.description: Normalized against base firerate, 100 is 1 second

kelvin_ice_path_lagcomp_move_linger_time.description: Extra time for ice path movement controller to linger to prevent mispredictions

kelvin_ice_shard_lagcomp_startdelay_time.description: Delay before ice shard's physics kick in to account for client latency

last_viewed_announce_id.description: Tracks the last announcement ID viewed so we can know when new announcements are available

lb_allow_time_sliced_shadow_map_renderin.description: Allow time-sliced shadow buffer rendering when enabled via gameinfo.gi

lb_barnlight_shadowmap_scale.description: Scale for computed barnlight shadowmap size

lb_csm_cascade_size_override.description: Override width/height of individual cascades in the CSM

lb_csm_override_staticgeo_cascades.description: Override Cascades that will render static objects with lb_csm_override_staticgeo_cascades_value

lb_csm_override_staticgeo_cascades_anima.description: If lb_csm_override_staticgeo_cascades, ensure only objects without animated verts, i.e. SCENEOBJECTFLAG_CAN_RENDER_INTO_SST flag will be excluded (as opposed to all static objects).

lb_csm_override_staticgeo_cascades_value.description: If lb_csm_override_staticgeo_cascades, override value used to determine which cascades render static objects

lb_csm_receiver_plane_depth_bias.description: Shader depth bias applied to shadow receiver (Note this conflicts with renderstate depth bias, both now default to 0)

lb_csm_receiver_plane_depth_bias_transmi.description: Depth bias applied to shadow receiver for transmissive backface geo (based on renderstate depthbias being 0)

lb_dynamic_shadow_penumbra.description: Adjust shadow penumbra based on light size

lb_dynamic_shadow_resolution_base.description: Base resolution for dynamic shadowmap sizing.  Shadowmap size of a screen sized light

lb_dynamic_shadow_resolution_base_cmp_sh.description: take min of lb_dynamic_shadow_resolution and barnlight shadowmapsize as base shadowmapsize

lb_dynamic_shadow_resolution_quantizatio.description: Quantization of dynamically computed shadow size

lb_enable_shadow_casting.description: Allow stationary/dynamic lights to cast shadows.

lb_low_quality_shader_fade_region_rescal.description: For envmaps in low quality shader mode, how much of the fade region to scale the envmap box by.

lb_shadow_map_cull_empty_mixed.description: Don't render shadows for mixed shadowmaps with no dynamics objects in view

lb_shadow_texture_height_override.description: Override height of shadow atlas texture

lb_shadow_texture_width_override.description: Override width of shadow atlas texture

lb_sun_csm_size_cull_threshold_texels.description: Size, in texels, where we will cull an object in the shadowmap

locator_topdown_style.description: Topdown games set this to handle distance and offscreen location differently.

mat_colcorrection_forceentitiesclientsid.description: Forces color correction entities to be updated on the client

mat_show_distance_field.description: 0=Off, 1=Visualize trace from camera, 2=Visualize occlusion, 3=Visualize far field trace from camera

mat_viewportscale.description: Scale down the main viewport (to reduce GPU impact on CPU profiling)

match_signout_book_loss_xp.description: How much book XP to award for a loss

match_signout_book_win_xp.description: How much book XP to award for a win

mem_test_each_frame.description: Run heap check at end of every frame

mem_test_every_n_seconds.description: Run heap check at a specified interval

mic_listen_while_nonfocused.description: Enables the ability for the mic to remain open if the window loses focus such as when a caster tabs out to adjust settings

mm_idle_enabled.description: Kill switch for the idle detection system

mm_idle_show_warning_at_s.description: How many seconds to wait before showing the idle warning dialog

mm_idle_warning_duration_s.description: How long should the warning be up before it boots the user from the MM queue

mm_prefer_solo_only.description: Prefer being matched with other solo players when not in a party

mobile_fps_increase_during_charging.description: MOBILE_FPS_CONTROL: If true we increase framerate limit while charging

mobile_fps_increase_during_hfr_animation.description: MOBILE_FPS_CONTROL: If true we increase framerate limit during HFR-tagged animations and transitions.

mobile_fps_increase_during_touch.description: MOBILE_FPS_CONTROL: If true we increase framerate limit during touch

mp_allowspectators.description: toggles whether the server allows spectator mode or not

mp_fadetoblack.description: fade a player's screen to black when he dies

mp_forcecamera.description: Restricts spectator modes for dead players

mp_friendlyfire.description: Allows team members to injure other members of their team

mp_restartgame.description: If non-zero, game will restart in the specified number of seconds

music_hideout_afk_timer_duration_seconds.description: Time spent at 0.0 speed before fade.

music_hideout_afk_timer_fade_in_duration.description: Fade in time once returning from AFK.

music_hideout_afk_timer_fade_out_duratio.description: Fade out time once AFK duration is exceeded.

music_log_abandoned_priorities.description: Prints a log message whenever low priority cues are discarded.

music_resume_fade_time_seconds.description: When resuming, fades music in over this duration of time.

music_resume_window_seconds.description: Seeks into music if resumed during this period of time.

nav_create_indirect_connection_set_from.description: Set the 'from' location of an indirect connection.

nav_create_indirect_connection_set_to.description: Set the 'to' location of an indirect connection.

nav_drag_selection_volume_zmax_offset.description: The offset of the nav drag volume top from center

nav_drag_selection_volume_zmin_offset.description: The offset of the nav drag volume bottom from center

nav_draw_limit.description: The maximum number of areas to draw in edit mode

nav_draw_mesh_grid.description: Draw the mesh's spatial grid structure around the edit cursor position.

nav_draw_mesh_offset.description: Vertical offset for drawing the mesh (useful for flat planes where the mesh is often a fixed offset from the physical ground

nav_draw_space_boundary.description: Draw the boundaries of the 3d nav space. 1 = draw flying space, 2 = draw swimming space

nav_edit.description: Set to one to interactively edit the Navigation Mesh. Set to zero to leave edit mode.

nav_gen_agent_radius_buffer.description: Buffer to add to agent radius before passing to nav gen

nav_gen_jump_connection_min_overlap_rati.description: Minimum edge overlap required for jump connection consideration as a percentage of agent radius

survey_force_question_type.description: Force a specific survey question type for survey questions

survey_min_games_played.description: Don't allow for showing the survey unless a minimum number of games have been played

sv_allchat.description: Players can receive all other players' text chat, no death restrictions

sv_alltalk.description: Players can hear all other players' voice communication, no team restrictions

sv_audio_log_citadel_audio_filter.description: Logs sound event information for CCitadelAudioFilter.

sv_audio_log_participant_start_messages.description: Prints when a participant sound message was sent.

sv_autosave.description: Set to 1 to autosave game on level transition. Does not affect autosave triggers.

sv_backspeed.description: How much to slow down backwards motion

sv_bounce.description: Bounce multiplier for when physically simulated objects collide with other objects.

sv_client_max_interp_ratio.description: This can be used to limit the value of cl_interp_ratio for connected clients (only while they are connected).

sv_client_min_interp_ratio.description: This can be used to limit the value of cl_interp_ratio for connected clients (only while they are connected).

sv_client_predict.description: This can be used to force the value of cl_predict for connected clients (only while they are connected). -1 = let clients set cl_predict to anything 0 = force cl_predict to 0 1 = force cl_predict to 1

sv_clockcorrection_msecs.description: The server tries to keep each player's m_nTickBase withing this many msecs of the server absolute tickcount

sv_clockdbg.description: Print spew related to server clock and ticking

sv_cluster.description: Data center cluster this server lives in.

sv_condense_late_buttons.description: When condensing late commands. Should we compress multiple moves of button presses into the target move?

sv_cq_trim_bloat_remainder.description: When trimming a bloated CQ, leave at least N more commands than the minimum

sv_cq_trim_bloat_space.description: When trimming a bloated CQ, try to leave room for N more commands to be added.  0 will trim only what is needed to remove the immediate bloat, a very large value will reset the whole queue.

sv_cq_trim_catchup_remainder.description: When trimming an overful CQ due to app 'catchup' request, leave at least N more commands than the minimum

sv_deltaticks_enforce.description: By default, player must ack delta ticks in order. How to enforce it: 2 = kick all clients, 1 = kick only TV clients, 0 = do not kick.

sv_deltaticks_log.description: Whether diagnostic logging is enabled when clients ack delta ticks out of order. Policy: 2 = log all out of order acks, 1 = log only when disconnect is triggered, 0 = do not log.

sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_extra_max.description: When encoding entity deltas, append on a random number of extra bytes.  This happens after sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_min_size.

sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_extra_min.description: When encoding entity deltas, append on a random number of extra bytes.  This happens after sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_min_size.

sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_min_size.description: When encoding entity deltas, if the delta size is < N bytes, then shove in N dummy bytes.  This happens before sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_extra_min/sv_dev_entitydeltapadding_extra_max

sv_disable_reliable_delta_retransmit.description: Assume that a reliable entity delta will be ack'ed and send future deltas relative to the last reliable delta.

sv_early_network_message_processing.description: Processes network messages on the server before entities think, instead of at the end of the tick.

sv_enable_alternate_baselines.description: Allow alternate baseline system, set to 2 for debugging spew.

sv_enable_delta_packing.description: When enabled, this allows for entity packing to use the property changes for building up the data. This is many times faster, but can be disabled for error checking.

sv_enable_donttransmit.description: When encoding entity deltas, instead of unreliably deducing explicit deletions, actually send list of existing but not networked entities (dont_transmit list) to each client.

sv_enable_hideout.description: When registering for MM, we can be assigned hideouts

sv_enable_lost_lobby.description: Kill switch for the lost lobby functionality

sv_enable_match.description: When registering for MM, we can be assigned normal matches

sv_ents_write_alarm.description: Print callstack every time CNetworkGameServerBase::WriteEntityUpdate takes more than this amount of milliseconds

sv_extra_client_connect_time.description: Seconds after client connect during which extra frames are buffered to prevent non-delta'd update

sv_filterban.description: Set packet filtering by IP mode

sv_force_transmit_ents.description: Will transmit all entities to client, regardless of PVS conditions (will still skip based on transmit flags, however).

sv_fps_max.description: Dedicated server frame rate limiter. 0=tick rate. Only applies to the dedicated server.

sv_friendly_dmg_immune.description: For npc's so marked, don't take damage caused by friendly (D_LI) npc's

sv_gameinstructor_disable.description: Force all clients to disable their game instructors.

sv_gameinstructor_enable.description: Force all clients to enable their game instructors.

sv_hibernate_postgame_delay.description: # of seconds to wait after final client leaves before hibernating.

sv_hibernate_when_empty.description: Puts the server into extremely low CPU usage mode when no clients connected

sv_hoststate_quit_syscall.description: When enabled, game server will quit immediately via syscall instead of running host states shutdown sequence

sv_infinite_ammo.description: Player's active weapon will never run out of ammo

sv_instancebaselines.description: Enable instanced baselines. Saves network overhead.

sv_ladder_slack_z_mult.description: Difference in Z increases toward the middle of the slack ladder.

sv_lagcomp_filterbyviewangle.description: If true, player pawn will filter lag compensation targets by their view angle.

sv_lagcompensationforcerestore.description: Don't test validity of a lag comp restore, just do it.

sv_lan.description: Server is a lan server ( no heartbeat, no authentication, no non-class C addresses )

sv_late_commands_allowed.description: Allow N late commands to run at 0 timescale prior to running an on-time command. Negative values for network round trip based calculation with a hard cap of the of absolute value

sv_log_change_offsets.description: Log change offsets to game/varchangeinfoN.log files.

sv_log_onefile.description: Log server information to only one file.

sv_logbans.description: Log server bans in the server logs.

sv_logblocks.description: If true when log when a query is blocked (can cause very large log files)

sv_logecho.description: Echo log information to the console.

sv_logfile.description: Log server information in the log file.

sv_logflush.description: Flush the log file to disk on each write (slow).

sv_logsdir.description: Folder in the game directory where server logs will be stored.

sv_long_frame_ms.description: If a server frame takes longer than N ms, complain about it.  (Dedicated server only.)  See also engine_frametime_warnings_enable.

sv_matchmaking_enabled.description: Register with the GC for matchmaking

sv_matchperfstats_maxclientperfsamples.description: Don't retain more than N perf samples for any given client

sv_matchperfstats_send_to_steam.description: Set to false to disable sending match perf stats to steam

sv_max_change_offsets.description: How many network changes to track before requiring full diff check.

sv_max_queries_sec.description: Maximum queries per second to respond to from a single IP address.

sv_max_queries_sec_global.description: Maximum queries per second to respond to from anywhere.

sv_max_queries_window.description: Window over which to average queries per second averages.

sv_max_unreliable_delta_size.description: Maximum allowable entity delta size over unreliable delivery.

sv_maxrate.description: Max bandwidth rate allowed on server, 0 == unlimited

sv_maxunlag_player.description: If >0, maximumum lag compensation used for other human pawns. Applied after sv_maxunlag!

sv_maxupdaterate.description: Maximum updates per second that the server will allow

sv_maxvelocity.description: Maximum speed any ballistically moving object is allowed to attain per axis.

sv_memlimit.description: If set, whenever a game ends, if the total memory used by the server is greater than this # of megabytes, the server will exit.

sv_merge_changes_after_tick_with_calcdel.description: This fixes bugs where pure calcdelta is used due to recipient changing but it doesn't pick up a field change where the value was changed back to same value as the from snapshot even though the destination fields change list does note the change. Set to 2 to spew any changes merged in by this fix.

sv_minrate.description: Min bandwidth rate allowed on server, 0 == unlimited

sv_minupdaterate.description: Minimum updates per second that the server will allow

sv_mmqueue_reservation_extended_timeout.description: Extended time in seconds before mmqueue reservation expires.

sv_mmqueue_reservation_timeout.description: Time in seconds before mmqueue reservation expires.

sv_mover_maxslope.description: The maximum slope the player can overcome [-]

sv_mover_pogodampingratio.description: The capsule pogo stick damping ratio [-]

sv_networkvar_perfieldtracking.description: Track individual field offset changes, rather than a single dirty flag for the whole entity.

sv_networkvar_validate.description: Validate each StateChanged against known offsets.

sv_no_navmesh.description: Block loading of the navmesh. Unplayable, only used for memory sampling.

sv_noclipduringpause.description: If cheats are enabled, then you can noclip with the game paused (for doing screenshots, etc.).

sv_parallel_checktransmit.description: Set to 1 to use threaded checkentities for transmit/pvs on listen servers, 2 for dedicated servers.

sv_parallel_packentities.description: Set to 1 to use threaded snapshot sending on listen servers, 2 for dedicated servers.

sv_parallel_sendsnapshot.description: 0: run all send jobs on main thread; 1: send jobs run asynchronously (except on dedicated server); 2: send jobs asynchronously; 3: send jobs run in parallel but block to not overlap the next tick; 4: main server clients' send jobs run in parallel, then HLTV server jobs; this approximately matches pre-async profile for a single HLTV server configuration

sv_pausable_dev.description: Whether listen server is pausable when running -dev and playing solo against bots

sv_pausable_dev_ds.description: Whether dedicated server is pausable when running -dev and playing solo against bots

sv_pause_on_console_open.description: 1 = Pause the game when pressing ~ to open the console. CTRL+~ opens the console without pause.

sv_per_player_spray_limit_count.description: How many total sprays each player can have in the map at the same time

sv_per_player_spray_limit_count_restrict.description: How many total sprays each player can have in the map at the same time (but in restricted modes)

sv_phys_async_buoyancy_update.description: If true, server buoyancy motion controllers are updated in an async job after the tick has completed.

sv_phys_sleep_enable.description: Enable sleeping for dynamic physics bodies.

sv_phys_sound_disable_impact_sounds_unde.description: if true, impact sounds wont play if no soft impact sound is present and the impact is below the hard velocity threshold.

sv_player_spray_collision_radius.description: How big of a collision sprays should have

sv_pvs_entity.description: If set, only allows this ent index to network (other than players and things that force sending).

sv_pvs_max_distance.description: if set, adds a maximum range to PVS/PAS checks

sv_pvs_random.description: If set, objects blink in/out of pvs randomly.

sv_rcon_banpenalty.description: Number of minutes to ban users who fail rcon authentication

sv_rcon_maxfailures.description: Max number of times a user can fail rcon authentication before being banned

sv_rcon_minfailures.description: Number of times a user can fail rcon authentication in sv_rcon_minfailuretime before being banned

sv_rcon_minfailuretime.description: Number of seconds to track failed rcon authentications

sv_recipients_check.description: When packing entities, check that recipient bits match for fast path packing.

sv_recvbuf_messages.description: Max number of messages that can be queued in a netchan receive buffer for an ordinary connection from a client.

sv_regeneration_force_on.description: Cheat to test regenerative health systems

sv_region.description: The region of the world to report this server in.

sv_replay_group_id.description: The replay group that this server will be uploading files to

sv_reserve_slots_for_reconnecting_player.description: Kick a previously connected player with the same steamID if a replacement comes along

sv_showdamage.description: Shows base damage below what sv_showimpacts would show, and if a player was hit he'll show the damage he took above it (as healthdamage (armorabsorbed)).  1 = show hits.  2 = show hits and misses

sv_showimpacts.description: Shows client (red) and server (blue) bullet impact point (1=both, 2=client-only, 3=server-only)

sv_showladders.description: Show bbox and dismount points for all ladders (must be set before level load.)

sv_showlagcompensation.description: If > 0, show lag compensated hitboxes whenever a player is lag compensated. Value is for how long.

sv_showlagcompensation_rec.description: If > 0, show lag compensation hitboxes as they're recorded. Value is for how long.

sv_showplayerhitboxes.description: Show lag compensated hitboxes for the specified player index whenever a player fires.

sv_shutdown_immediately_on_request.description: The server will always shutdown on receiving the shutdown request, even if not hibernating

sv_skyname.description: Current name of the skybox texture

sv_snapshot_unlimited.description: For debugging, don't throw away old snapshots so that if you break in debugger (on remote client or server) it won't require an uncompressed update to resume.  You may run out of memory of course...

sv_steamauth_enforce.description: By default, player must maintain a reliable connection to Steam servers. When player Steam session drops, enforce it: 2 = instantly kick, 1 = kick at next spawn, 0 = do not kick.

sv_steamauth_ignore_localhost.description: Ignore VAC and auth errors for client connected via localhost address or in-engine loopback

sv_steamgroup_exclusive.description: If set, only members of Steam group will be able to join the server when it's empty, public people will be able to join the server only if it has players.

sv_stopspeed.description: Minimum stopping speed when on ground.

sv_stressbots.description: If set to 1, the server calculates data and fills packets to bots. Used for perf testing.

sv_strict_notarget.description: If set, notarget will cause entities to never think they are in the pvs

sv_temp_baseline_string_table_buffer_siz.description: Buffer size for writing string table baselines

sv_tick_parallel_with_client.description: Runs the final server tick of the frame in parallel with client work

sv_timeout.description: After this many seconds without a message from fully connected client, the client is dropped

sv_timeout_hideout_lobby.description: The amount of time to keep a server active for a hideout in minutes

sv_timeout_matchactive.description: To prevent zombie matches, if a match has been active longer than this many minutes, it should be timed out and the server restarted

sv_timeout_matchforming.description: The GC has told this server that it is providing it a match but the server hasn't received the lobby in this many minutes so it should restart

sv_timeout_nogcconnection.description: How many minutes if the server fails to make an initial connection to the GC before the server tries to restart

sv_timeout_nommupdate.description: If the GC hasn't sent an idle keep alive from the match maker in this many minutes, the server will restart

sv_timeout_random_range.description: The number of seconds to randomize the timeouts to help avoid the risk of all servers restarting at the same time

sv_unlag_fixstuck.description: Disallow backtracking a player for lag compensation if it will cause them to become stuck

sv_unpause_on_console_close.description: 1 = Unpause the game when pressing ~ to close the console. 0 = Leave the game paused.

sv_usercmd_custom_random_seed.description: When enabled server will populate an additional random seed independent of the client

sv_usercmd_execute_warning_ms.description: Emit a warning if we spend more than N ms executing user commands for a single player

sv_visiblemaxplayers.description: Overrides the max players reported to prospective clients

sv_voicecodec.description: Specifies which voice codec DLL to use in a game. Set to the name of the DLL without the extension.

sv_watchtransmit.description: Watch NetworkStateChanged info for this entity index.

sv_waterdist.description: Vertical view fixup when eyes are near water plane.

sys_minidumpspewlines.description: Lines of crash dump console spew to keep.

team_chat_auto_join.description: Auto-join Team Chat when joining a match. Will be overridden by any party settings.

think_limit.description: Maximum think time in milliseconds, warning is printed if this is exceeded.

timewarp_projectile_timescale_override.description: Override timescale for objects that touch a times warp not handled by the wall itself

trooper_zipline_distance_to_drop_from_en.description: How many units away from an enemy captured zipline that troopers will exit

tv_advertise_watchable.description: GOTV advertises the match as watchable via game UI, clients watching via UI will not need to type password

tv_allow_autorecording_index.description: When >=0 restricts autorecording only to the specified TV index

tv_allow_camera_man.description: Auto director allows spectators to become camera man

tv_allow_static_shots.description: Auto director uses fixed level cameras for shots

tv_autorecord.description: Automatically records all games as SourceTV demos.

tv_autoretry.description: Relay proxies retry connection after network timeout

tv_broadcast.description: Automatically broadcasts all games as GOTV demos through Steam.

tv_broadcast1.description: Automatically broadcasts all games as GOTV[1] demos through Steam.

tv_broadcast_keyframe_interval.description: The frequency, in seconds, of sending keyframes and delta fragments to the broadcast relay server

tv_broadcast_keyframe_interval1.description: The frequency, in seconds, of sending keyframes and delta fragments to the broadcast1 relay server

tv_broadcast_max_requests.description: Max number of broadcast http requests in flight. If there is a network issue, the requests may start piling up, degrading server performance. If more than the specified number of requests are in flight, the new requests are dropped.

tv_broadcast_max_requests1.description: Max number of broadcast1 http requests in flight. If there is a network issue, the requests may start piling up, degrading server performance. If more than the specified number of requests are in flight, the new requests are dropped.

tv_broadcast_origin_auth.description: X-Origin-Auth header of the broadcast POSTs

tv_broadcast_origin_auth1.description: X-Origin-Auth header of the broadcast1 POSTs

tv_broadcast_origin_delay.description: Injection delay request for CDN rebroadcast frameworks, seconds

tv_broadcast_spew_threshold.description: The threshold, in seconds, that we'll spew about the snapshot tick

tv_broadcast_startup_resend_interval.description: The interval, in seconds, of re-sending startup data to the broadcast relay server (useful in case relay crashes, restarts or startup data http request fails)

tv_broadcast_terminate.description: Terminate every broadcast with a stop command

tv_chatgroupsize.description: Set the default chat group size

tv_chattimelimit.description: Limits spectators to chat only every n seconds

tv_citadel_auto_record.description: If enabled, a demo will automatically be recorded for every game

tv_citadel_max_transition_distance.description: How far we will really try to transition from player to player

tv_deltacache.description: Enable delta entity bit stream cache

tv_dispatchmode.description: Dispatch clients to relay proxies: 0=never, 1=if appropriate, 2=always

tv_enable_delta_frames.description: Indicates whether or not the tv should use delta frames for storage of intermediate frames. This takes more CPU but significantly less memory.

tv_enable_dynamic.description: When enabled, changes in tv_enable convars cause immediate startup or shutdown of hltv server

tv_grouprelaydatareliable.description: When enabled, this will collect all information for relay sending into a single datagram to ensure that the data stays together through a potentially large number of relays

tv_grouprelaydataunreliable.description: When enabled, this will collect all information for relay sending into a single datagram to ensure that the data stays together through a potentially large number of relays

tv_grouprelaydatavoice.description: Similar to tv_grouprelaydata, but controls whether or not the voice channels should be routed into the grouped data for the relays

tv_include_usercommands.description: HLTV streams will include player usercommands each tick

tv_instant_replay_full_frame_build_threa.description: Build the full frames on a seperate job thread

tv_listen_voice_indices.description: Bitfield of playerslots to listen to voice messages from when connected to SourceTV, default is none

tv_listen_voice_indices_h.description: High 32 bits of bitfield of playerslots to listen to voice messages from when connected to SourceTV, default is none

tv_log_director_events.description: Log game events being considered by the director

tv_maxclients.description: Maximum client number on SourceTV server.

tv_maxclients_relayreserved.description: This number of relay client connections are reserved for SourceTV relays.

tv_maxrate.description: Max SourceTV spectator bandwidth rate allowed, 0 == unlimited

tv_nochat.description: Don't receive chat messages from other SourceTV spectators

tv_overridemaster.description: Overrides the SourceTV master root address.

tv_playcast_delay_resync.description: To alleviate intermittent network connectivity problems, this is the number of seconds to wait before actually re-syncing the stream after failure

tv_playcast_fragment_cache_history_lengt.description: How far back before our current playback head in seconds to hold onto fragments.

tv_playcast_retry_timeout.description: In case of intermittent network problems, how long should playcast retry fragment retrieval before resorting to resync

tv_playcast_slow_playback_when_fragment_.description: Whether or not we slow playback rate if we start running out of buffered stream fragments.

tv_rate_multiplier.description: Multiply requested rate by this value to adjust Dota TV send rate

tv_record_immediate.description: tv_record starting the moment tv_record was executed, not tv_delay earlier

tv_relay_quit_after_game.description: Quit after a game has been relayed, do not hibernate

tv_relay_secret_code.description: When enabled, this will use a uniquely generated server code to authenticate relay to relay connections. This code is coordinated via the GC or some external means rather than by clients directly

tv_secret_code.description: When enabled, this will use a uniquely generated server code to authenticate relay connections. This code is coordinated via the GC or some external means rather than by clients directly

tv_secure_bypass.description: Bypass secure challenge on TV port

tv_threaded_merge_entity_deltas.description: Enable SourceTV threading of delta merging

tv_title.description: Set title for SourceTV spectator UI

tv_transmitall.description: Transmit all entities (not only director view)

tv_update_hibernation_enabled.description: Allow SourceTV to control server hibernation state.

tv_window_size.description: Specifies the number of seconds worth of frames that the tv replay system should keep in memory. Increasing this greatly increases the amount of memory consumed by the TV system

ui_hud_dist.description: distance from the player to the hud

vis_sunlight_enable.description: Toggle whether to use sunlight PVS for sunlight views (0 = sky PVS, 1 = sunlight PVS)

voice_always_sample_mic.description: When enabled, open the voip audio input stream when the application launches.

voice_input_stallout.description: Time before we consider a mic stalled out and need to reset it.

voice_sequence_maximum_wait_time.description: When receiving packets out of sequence, wait this many seconds for missing sequences to arrive

voice_threshold.description: decibel threshold for how loud the talker's input signal is before we think they are talking.

voice_threshold_attack.description: Amount of time we buffer outgoing audio to detect an onset.

voice_threshold_delay.description: Amount of time the talker is silent before we infer that they are no longer talking.

voice_threshold_hold.description: Amount of time after the talker starts talking we should keep listening regardless of how loud they are speaking.

voice_threshold_ramp_min_db.description: A dB floor of when to stop transmitting packets, the volume between this and voice_threshold will still transmit packets to allow for volume ramping.

voice_vox.description: Voice chat uses a vox-style always on

voice_vox_current_peak.description: Current peak value (out of 64k) of the incoming voice stream

volume_fog_shadow_penumbra_multiplier.description: Penumbra size multiplier for shadow sampling, reduces fog shadow aliasing

wrecking_ball_muddy.description: The extent to which the Wrecker's boulder behaves 'muddy', meaning how much its jumps up are dampened

zipline_use_new_latch.description: Use the new latch motion for getting on a zipline. 0: Dont use 1: Just those with b_UseNewZipLineSetup 2: Everyone use

zoom_sensitivity_ratio.description: Additional mouse sensitivity scale factor applied when FOV is zoomed in.
